milestones.title: School Foundation
milestones.description: Completed higher secondary education with a strong foundation in mathematics and science. First exposure to programming and logical thinking.

milestones.title: B.Tech CSE-IoT
milestones.description: Joined Techno Main Salt Lake, Kolkata for B.Tech in Computer Science (IoT). Started building web applications and exploring modern technologies.

milestones.title: Building Projects
milestones.description: Developed multiple full-stack applications including AI-powered tools, developer dashboards, and IoT monitoring systems. Started contributing to open source.

milestones.title: Hackathons & Community
milestones.description: Participated in hackathons, coding competitions, and developer community events. Building connections and learning from industry professionals.

milestones.title: What's Next
milestones.description: Seeking meaningful internships, contributing to impactful open-source projects, and diving deeper into AI/ML and scalable system design.
